title: Resolve vacuum-current condition: JV4: u_vac domain guard
description: Sector: u_vac / J_V domain. Allowed condition: u_vac is defined only after J_V is nonzero, timelike where needed, and physically sourced. Forbidden condition: u_vac is chosen first and then used to manufacture J_V or Sigma_V. Consequence: no frame field can rescue mass routing while J_V is undefined..
